name: Cisatracurium
executiveSummary: Non-depolarizing relaxant degraded by Hofmann elimination; useful in liver disease and CKD.
indications:
## Indications

- Neuromuscular blockade in ICU and surgery when organ-independent elimination is desired.

## Precautions

- Histamine-mediated reactions with rapid bolus administration. Monitor TOF (Train-of-Four).

> Adjust according to institutional protocols and medical prescription.

pediatrico.dose: 0.1–0.15 mg/kg bolus; infusion according to TOF.

bibliography.citation: American Heart Association. ACLS / PALS / NRP Guidelines.
ANMAT. Drug information and authorized prescribing information in Argentina.
Society of Critical Care Medicine (SCCM). ICU medication guidelines.
American Academy of Pediatrics. Medication guidance in critical care.
